paper_title: Study of Flowering and Pollen Production in Oenothera Species

methods.description: Process for establishing experimental plots for studying flowering and pollen production in Oenothera species.

steps.description: Seeds were obtained in 2012 from natural populations in SE Poland (Lublin and Mielec).
steps.searchable_summary: collect seeds from natural populations in SE Poland

steps.description: Seeds were sown onto a light substrate at the end of each April.
steps.searchable_summary: sow seeds onto a light substrate in April

steps.description: After germination, the seedlings were planted out in September.
Each experimental plot contained approximately 20-30 individuals per species, per year.
steps.searchable_summary: allocate 20-30 individuals per species in plots

steps.description: All plants were grown in experimental plots (approx. 2 m2 in two replicates for each species) on loess soil (pH of 6-7) at the site which is fully exposed to the sun.
steps.searchable_summary: grow plants in plots on loess soil with pH 6-7
